code: import React from'react';import{Link}from'react-router-dom';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const categories=[{name:'Refrigerator',icon:'🧊',bg:'#e3f2fd'},{name:'Oven',icon:'🍳',bg:'#fff3e0'},{name:'Iron Machine',icon:'👔',bg:'#f3e5f5'},{name:'Rice Cooker',icon:'🍚',bg:'#e8f5e9'},{name:'Washing Machine',icon:'🫧',bg:'#e0f7fa'},{name:'Fan',icon:'💨',bg:'#fff8e1'},{name:'LED TV',icon:'📺',bg:'#fce4ec'},{name:'Air Conditioner',icon:'❄️',bg:'#e8eaf6'}];const CategoryGrid=()=>{return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("section",{className:"py-14 px-4",style:{backgroundColor:'#f5f5f5'},children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"max-w-7xl mx-auto",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"text-3xl font-bold text-center mb-2",style:{color:'#0057B8'},children:"Product Categories"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"text-center text-gray-500 mb-8",children:"Browse our full range of home appliances"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 gap-4",children:categories.map(cat=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Link,{to:`/products?category=${encodeURIComponent(cat.name)}`,className:"flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-6 rounded-xl shadow-md hover:shadow-xl transition-all hover:-translate-y-1 cursor-pointer",style:{backgroundColor:cat.bg},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"text-5xl mb-3",children:cat.icon}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"font-semibold text-gray-700 text-center text-sm",children:cat.name})]},cat.name))})]})});};export default CategoryGrid;
